title_en: Granola Showdown: Homemade vs. Store-Bought Bars
title_es: Granola Enfrentamiento: Casera vs. Barras de Tienda
hook_en: Which granola wins? Let's find out!
key_message: Homemade granola is healthier and free from harmful additives found in many store-bought bars.
visual_elements: Split screen showing homemade granola ingredients on one side and a store-bought granola bar on the other
Close-up shots of oats, nuts, and honey
Highlighting labels of artificial ingredients on granola bar packaging
Final shot of a candy bar next to a granola bar with sugar content overlay
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade granola (oats, nuts, honey) vs. PROCESSED: Store-bought granola bars (HFCS, soy lecithin, TBHQ) — Many granola bars have more sugar than a candy bar

title_en: Granola Bar Breakdown: Truth in Ingredients
title_es: Desglose de Barras de Granola: La Verdad en Ingredientes
hook_en: Ever read a granola bar label? Let's dive in!
hook_es: ¿Alguna vez leíste una etiqueta de barra de granola? ¡Vamos a explorar!
key_message: Store-bought granola bars often contain hidden sugars and preservatives, unlike homemade options.
visual_elements: Quick zoom-in on a granola bar ingredient list
Cut to a bowl of oats, nuts, and a jar of honey
Highlighting words like 'HFCS' and 'TBHQ' on the bar packaging
Comparison of sugar content in granola bar vs. homemade ingredients
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade granola (oats, nuts, honey) vs. PROCESSED: Store-bought granola bars (HFCS, soy lecithin, TBHQ) — Many granola bars have more sugar than a candy bar
